Poison activates after your opponent's turn. Meanwhile, more aggressive builds can kill enemies before they attack. Besides, as you play, you seldom need to play more than 1 or 2 turns if you play around strike based builds.
And that's just what I've tried myself. There's probably plenty of other specific builds.

How does Alva's wheel work exactly? 
Is it
Def > Strike > Def > Strike
Second Strike gets +30% crit rate

or
Def > Def > Strike
Strike gets +30% crit rate

I think it means... if you play Strike Card it gives 15% Defence Card. 

If you play Defence Card then it gives 15% Crit.
